title: Golden Fluffy French Apple Crepes
description: A delicious and crowd-pleasing French dish from Provence, these crepes are filled with tender apples and a hint of cinnamon, perfect for a sweet dessert or snack. The combination of fluffy crepes and sweet apples is a match made in heaven.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, milk, eggs, sugar, and cinnamon until smooth.
Heat a small non-stick pan over medium heat and brush with melted butter.
Pour about 1/4 cup of the batter into the pan and tilt to evenly coat the bottom.
Cook the crepe for about 2 minutes, until the bottom is golden brown, then flip and cook for another minute.
Repeat with the remaining batter, until all the crepes are cooked.
In a separate pan, cook the sliced apples over medium heat with a pinch of salt until tender.
To assemble the crepes, place a few slices of the cooked apples in the center of each crepe, then roll up and place in a ramekin.
Serve the crepes warm, dust with cinnamon if desired.
